message:
fix: resolve clippy lints across workspace

- canary.rs: use checked_div() and is_multiple_of()
- fnx_directed.rs: allow too_many_arguments for DFS/Tarjan internals
- test files: use let-chains for collapsible-if patterns
- fnx_differential_report.rs: combine identical if-else blocks
- phase1_rollout_gate.rs: use struct initializer
- mermaid_parser.rs: use contains_key() instead of get().is_some()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
